payloadAsciiStrings: Infantry
This basic unit of the Hume is inferior in combat, but consumes little mana.
Panzer
This ironclad soldier moves very slowly, but provides high Defense, an advantage over lightweight horsemen units like Cavalry and Scouts.
Cavalry
This unit has fast Movement and Attack Speeds, making it ideal to deal with low-defense units or to raid the enemy tower.
Hunter
Specialized in aerial and long-ranged attacks. It is inferior in close quarters combat due to its low HP .
Gliders
Throws javelins from the air. Use it to attack the enemy's infantry units without risk, or to destroy the enemy tower without interference.
Thief
This unit steals mana from the enemy with each attack, but must be kept safely from melee attacks due to its inferior combat capabilities.
Shielder
This highly defensive unit pushes the enemy backward with each attack. Create a barricade with several of these to keep your tower impenetrable.
Spearman
This unit attacks multiple enemies and pushes them backward. It is stronger in groups than when alone.
Rider
This advanced Cavalry provides a higher Movement Speed and enhanced combat capabilities.
Artillery
Shoots cannons to attack multiple enemies from a distance. This powerful shooter is effective against Shielders, Goblins, and Siege Golems, but vulnerable to melee attacks.
Bomber
This aerial unit bombards the enemy on the ground  but it is a sitting duck for aerial enemies, for it does not have an aerial attack.
Interceptor
This unit is the best at midair dogfights. Use it to shoot down Bombers, Queen Bees, and Wyvern Riders.
Medic
This healer unit ensures maximum defense when used in combination with Shielders and Infantry Officers.
Gun Cavalry
This horseback gunslinger is effective against defensive units. it also has a high survival rate as it automatically moves backward after each attack.
Infantry Officer
This unit is the best heavy infantryman of the Hume, providing Defense equal to that of the Shielder, along with high HP and reliable Attack Strength.
Battleship
This Hume flying fortress is excellent in both air-to-ground and anti-personnel attacks, and its bullets push enemies backward.
Knoll
The Knoll is very weak, but consumes the least amount of mana among all the units and races with a short Spawn Delay. Use it in large numbers in the beginning of a stage to overwhelm the enemy.
Minota
Moves slowly and consumes more mana than the Knoll, but makes up for it with its high Attack Strength.
Bunny
This unit inflicts damage on multiple enemies . It is stronger in groups than when alone.
Short hair
This unit moves and attacks at an extremely high speed. It is effective against the enemy's basic units, but inferior to heavy infantrymen.
Pigling
Charges at multiple enemies to inflict damage  and push them backward with its tusks. It is almost invincible when in groups.
Foxbow
This archer unit  is one of a few units of the Busters that are capable of aerial attacks.
Goblin
This unit self-destructs near enemies. Despite of its massive Attack Strength, you should use it only when many enemies are near, as it perishes after just one attack.
Big Hippo
A well-rounded unit with high HP, Defense, and a fast speed. Use it to keep the enemy at bay.
Harpy
This unit flies around and shoot arrow-like feathers.  Damange isn't too impressive, however.
Werewolf
This unit is the fastest among the normal units, use it to raid the enemy. It is inferior to heavy infantrymen like Infantry Officers and Siege Golems .
Rhino
This unit charges at multiple enemies to inflict great damage  and push them far away.
Salamander
This unit breathes fire to attack multiple enemies.  Use it to instantly finish a group of low-defense units.
Cyclops
Throws rocks at enemies from afar. This unit is effective against defensive units.
Queen Bee
#$%This aerial unit delivers a kamikaze attack on the enemy hero upon detection, while fighting aerial and infantry units.
Shaman
This non-combat unit uses black magic to immobilize the enemy and turn their Defense into 0. It is especially effective against the enemy with only a small group  of advanced units.
Behemoth
Fists down the enemy and inflicts substantial damage.  It moves quickly, but its Attack Speed is slow; not an ideal unit against multiple enemies.
